stages.name: Stage 1: 15 Meters
stages.briefing: Shooters on the line, ready and holster your pistol. On the sound of the shot timer, you will have 22 seconds to draw from the holster and fire 4 rounds standing, then 4 rounds kneeling at 15 meters.

stages.name: Stage 2: 7 Meters
stages.briefing: Shooters on the line, ready and holster your pistol. On the sound of the shot timer, you will have 8 seconds to start from high ready, fire 2 rounds, conduct a reload, then fire 2 more rounds at 7 meters.

stages.name: Stage 3: 5 Meters
stages.briefing: Shooters on the line, ready and holster your pistol. On the sound of the shot timer, you will complete 3 repetitions; for each rep you have 5 seconds to draw from the holster and fire 2 centre mass and 1 head at 5 meters.

stages.name: Stage 4: 25 Meters
stages.briefing: Shooters on the line, ready and holster your pistol. On the sound of the shot timer, you will have 45 seconds to draw from the holster and fire 3 standing, 3 standing from cover, and 3 kneeling from cover at 25 meters.

drills.description: Draw, 3 Standing, 3 Standing Cover, 3 Kneeling Cover

stages.name: Stage 1: 15 Meters
stages.briefing: Shooters on the line, ready and holster your pistol. On the sound of the shot timer, you will have 30 seconds to draw from the holster and fire 4 rounds STANDING, toggle to kneeling (K), then fire 4 rounds KNEELING at 15 meters.

stages.name: Stage 2: 7 Meters
stages.briefing: Shooters on the line, ready and holster your pistol. Each block: on the sound of the timer, issue the Police challenge, draw from the holster, fire 2 to emergency reload, then fire 2 rounds (10s total).

drills.label: Iteration 1
drills.description: Issue Challenge, Draw, 2 Rds, Emerg Reload, 2 Rds

drills.label: Iteration 2
drills.description: Issue Challenge, Draw, 2 Rds, Emerg Reload, 2 Rds

stages.name: Stage 3: 5 Meters
stages.briefing: Shooters on the line. Complete 2 timed blocks. Block 1: Draw and fire 2 CM, 1 head (5s). Block 2: High ready, fire 2 CM, 2 head (5s).
